Get Started

OUR TEAM

Meet the Founders

NextGen STEM was founded by three students at Western Reserve Academy who believe every student deserves access to the kind of mentorship that drives real results.

Maanav Patel

Chief Operations Officer

Maanav led his team to the national tournament in Science Olympiad as team captain. He founded a science paper at WRA, volunteers as a coach for Hudson Middle School Science Olympiad, and is working on a melanoma cancer research project. He is also founding ProjectMIND, a mental health and neuroscience awareness chapter at WRA.

Photo Coming Soon

Arav Mathur

Chief Communications Officer

Arav is developing a cancer research project focused on A375 cancer cells. He is president and founder of the WRA chess team and has provided over 20 hours of chess tutoring to Western Reserve students. He holds multiple varsity positions, demonstrating strong balance of athletics and academics.

Photo Coming Soon

Ronit Arora

Chief Strategy & Research Officer

Ronit has founded multiple clubs and tutored hundreds of hours through WRA’s Peer Tutoring program. He has won multiple 1st place state Math Field Day titles in West Virginia and previously managed a reselling business where he gained early experience in entrepreneurship and market research.

NextGen STEM

Student-led STEM mentorship for the next generation.
